blocks.title: DeterministicFollowUps
rows: Ensure that the booking process is blocked if required forms are not signed.

rawData.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a hard block if required forms are missing, but the evidence does not confirm this functionality. The linked use case specifies that booking is blocked until required consent forms are signed, yet there is no evidence provided that explicitly demonstrates the implementation of this hard block mechanism. The absence of evidence regarding the management of required forms leads to a clear gap in fulfilling this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of hard block functionality when required forms are missing.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Implement hard block validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Ensure that the booking process is blocked if required forms are not signed.
